text: John Travolta, one of the Church of Scientology's most high-profile members, has expressed his disinterest in watching HBO's new critical documentary, "Going Clear: Scientology and the Prison of Belief". Travolta stated he has been happy with his 40-year experience with the Church, and believes the documentary is the result of disgruntled individuals. He credited the Church with helping him survive the death of his son in 2009.

text: A man has died at Walt Disney World Speedway's Exotic Driving Experience after a Lamborghini crashed into a guardrail. The passenger, 36-year-old Gary Terry, died at the scene, while the driver, 24-year-old Tavon Watson, was hospitalised with minor injuries.

A passenger died and the driver was injured when a Lamborghini crashed into a guardrail at the Exotic Driving Experience in Walt Disney World Speedway. The driver lost control of the vehicle. Petty Holdings, the company operating the experience, expressed condolences and also operates the Richard Petty Driving Experience.
